headline: STERIS to Host a Conference Call for Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on May 12, 2026
summary: DUBLIN, IRELAND, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) (“STERIS” or the “Company”) announced today that it will host a conference call to discuss its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full year results at 9:00 a.m. ET on May 12, 2026. The conference call can be heard live at www.steris-ir.com or via phone by dialing 1-833-535-2199 in the United States or 1-412-902-6776 internationally, then asking to join the conference call for STERIS plc.
